title: AWaC workspace.yml
description: Workspace manifest. Schema awac/2 adds optional `deploy_overrides` and `devvault_overrides` so a workspace can pin per-feature variations (e.g. test workspace pointing to staging) without editing the canonical stack metadata. awac/1 manifests are still accepted by the CLI; schema awac/2 is required only when overrides are present.

schema.description: AWaC schema version this manifest conforms to. Use awac/2 when declaring deploy_overrides or devvault_overrides.

oneOf.description: Either a registry shortcut ('core') or full 'org/repo'.
Special block for Odoo modules (resolved per the org's module_convention).

modules.description: Top-level Odoo module list (alternative to per-stack 'org+modules').

deploy_overrides.description: Per-component overrides that the CLI merges on top of <product>/agent-stack/deploy.yml (workspace wins). Keyed by component name. Any field of the stack component may be overridden — e.g. swap a test workspace's odoo_sh project to staging, redirect a promote_after_pass branch, skip a component in this workspace, etc. Requires schema awac/2.

skip.description: Skip this component in this workspace's deploys. Useful for test/staging workspaces that only touch a subset.

target.description: Override the target type. Must be in the stack component's `targets_available` list when that field is set.

devvault_overrides.description: Per-secret path overrides applied on top of <product>/agent-stack/devvault.yml (workspace wins). Keyed by logical secret name. Useful when this workspace should resolve a logical secret to a sub-vault (e.g. staging credentials) without changing the catalog. Requires schema awac/2.

additionalProperties.description: Alternative path (relative to ~/.devvault/<vault_path>/) for this logical secret in this workspace.

product.description: Optional. The product slug this workspace targets, used by `wsp deploy` and `wsp secrets check` when invoked without an explicit product argument. When omitted, the CLI infers from the first product-bearing stack in `stacks`.
